{{Infobox character
| name = Varia Selethir
| aliases = Varia
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Varia Selethir]] is [[Cheska Bennett]]’s quartermaster.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Varia is a quartermaster.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Varia is an orange-clad quartermaster for Cheska.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
